parameters.subsql:
SELECT
    la.leads_id AS internal_lead_id, -- Внутренний идентификатор лида
    MAX(CASE WHEN la.attribute_id = '978575' THEN la.value END) AS priority, -- Атрибут "Приоритет"
    MAX(CASE WHEN la.name = 'utm_source' THEN LOWER(la.value) END) AS utm_source, -- Атрибут utm_source
    MAX(CASE WHEN la.name = 'source' THEN LOWER(la.value) END) AS source, -- Атрибут source
    MAX(CASE WHEN la.attribute_id = '991037' THEN la.value END) AS deal_amount, -- Сумма сделки
    MAX(CASE WHEN la.attribute_id = '1004725' THEN CAST(la.value AS INTEGER) END) AS duplicate, -- Идентификатор дубликата сделки
    DATE(gd.full_date) AS creation_date -- Дата создания сделки
FROM 
    amocrm_leads_attributes la
JOIN amocrm_leads_facts alf ON la.leads_id = alf.leads_id -- Соединяем с таблицей фактов сделок
JOIN general_dates gd ON alf.created_id = gd.id -- Соединяем с таблицей общих дат
GROUP BY 
    la.leads_id, gd.full_date

SELECT 
  leads_id,
  STRING_AGG(name, ', ') AS tags
FROM amocrm_leads_tags
GROUP BY leads_id
ORDER BY leads_id

SELECT DISTINCT
    la.leads_id
FROM 
    amocrm_leads_attributes la
WHERE 
    -- Общий признак: есть атрибут "Новый запрос"
    la.attribute_id = '944979' AND la.value = 'Новый запрос' 
    AND (
        -- 1 признак: есть атрибут "Первичная сделка"
        la.leads_id IN (
            SELECT leads_id FROM amocrm_leads_attributes WHERE attribute_id = '993439'
        )
        OR
            -- Или 2 признак: нет атрибута "Прошлая причина отказа"
            la.leads_id NOT IN (
                SELECT leads_id FROM amocrm_leads_attributes WHERE attribute_id = '989757'
            )
    )

details.query:
SELECT * FROM (
SELECT
    la.leads_id AS internal_lead_id, -- Внутренний идентификатор лида
    MAX(CASE WHEN la.attribute_id = '978575' THEN la.value END) AS priority, -- Атрибут "Приоритет"
    MAX(CASE WHEN la.name = 'utm_source' THEN LOWER(la.value) END) AS utm_source, -- Атрибут utm_source
    MAX(CASE WHEN la.name = 'source' THEN LOWER(la.value) END) AS source, -- Атрибут source
    MAX(CASE WHEN la.attribute_id = '991037' THEN la.value END) AS deal_amount, -- Сумма сделки
    MAX(CASE WHEN la.attribute_id = '1004725' THEN CAST(la.value AS INTEGER) END) AS duplicate, -- Идентификатор дубликата сделки
    DATE(gd.full_date) AS creation_date -- Дата создания сделки
FROM 
    amocrm_leads_attributes la
JOIN amocrm_leads_facts alf ON la.leads_id = alf.leads_id -- Соединяем с таблицей фактов сделок
JOIN general_dates gd ON alf.created_id = gd.id -- Соединяем с таблицей общих дат
GROUP BY 
    la.leads_id, gd.full_date
) AS source

SELECT * FROM (
SELECT 
  leads_id,
  STRING_AGG(name, ', ') AS tags
FROM amocrm_leads_tags
GROUP BY leads_id
ORDER BY leads_id
) AS source

SELECT * FROM (
SELECT DISTINCT
    la.leads_id
FROM 
    amocrm_leads_attributes la
WHERE 
    -- Общий признак: есть атрибут "Новый запрос"
    la.attribute_id = '944979' AND la.value = 'Новый запрос' 
    AND (
        -- 1 признак: есть атрибут "Первичная сделка"
        la.leads_id IN (
            SELECT leads_id FROM amocrm_leads_attributes WHERE attribute_id = '993439'
        )
        OR
            -- Или 2 признак: нет атрибута "Прошлая причина отказа"
            la.leads_id NOT IN (
                SELECT leads_id FROM amocrm_leads_attributes WHERE attribute_id = '989757'
            )
    )
) AS source

result_schema.guid_formula:
IF [priority_1_16lj] = "C" 
    -- Если было событие квала
    AND ([date_qual_tlms] IS NOT NULL 
         AND [date_qual_tlms] > [creation_date_time_dbzt]) 
    THEN
    1
END

END
